# SCORE Online Courses and Academy

Last reviewed for BOSS Library ingestion: 2026-06-21

## BOSS Library tags
score, online-courses, academy, startup-roadmap

## Resource purpose
Self-guided SCORE online courses and SCORE Academy learning path resources.

## How the BOSS AI Librarian should use this resource
Use when the user wants structured self-paced learning. Good for entrepreneurs who need a defined path rather than browsing individual articles.

## Best-fit BOSS lifecycle stage
Ideation, Validation, Formation, Launch, Growth, and Exit/Transition depending on the course selected.

## Best audience
Self-directed learners and users who want a course instead of scattered articles.

## Key resources or subresources
- SCORE Online Courses: https://www.score.org/online-courses/ — Course catalog page.
- SCORE Academy: https://academy.score.org/ — SCORE learning platform.
- Startup Roadmap: https://www.score.org/startup-roadmap/ — Free guided startup pathway.
- How to Use AI to Grow Your Business: https://www.score.org/business-education/how-use-ai-grow-your-business/ — Technology/AI learning resource.
- Simple Steps for Exiting Your Business: https://www.score.org/online-courses/ — Exit/transition course listed in SCORE course catalog.

## BOSS routing notes
- Some SCORE courses may be free and some may be premium/paid; BOSS should avoid stating a price unless the live page is checked at time of response.
- For early-stage users, Startup Roadmap is often the best course-like path before entity formation or spending on branding.
- For users asking about AI, connect the Technology/AI hub and AI course/webinar resources with a mentor if the business use case is unclear.

## Response pattern for BOSS
Use this resource as a routing destination, not as a substitute for professional legal, tax, lending, procurement, or compliance advice. For time-sensitive workshops, deadlines, prices, contact details, or eligibility rules, send the user to the live source URL first.
